deviations.description: The process model only requires asking the patient about pain every 20 minutes when local anesthesia is administered and the patient has high tolerance. It does not require administering additional anesthesia every 20 minutes, as mandated by the new requirement in Version 2. This results in a direct violation of the stricter obligation.

The process continues to require asking the patient about pain every 20 minutes, which is no longer required by the updated compliance requirement in Version 2. This results in unnecessary enforcement of an outdated constraint.
